failedAssertions.reason: Runtime defaults to enabled but dispatches continuation with plain sendUserMessage(prompt) instead of the contract-required sendUserMessage(prompt, { deliverAs: "followUp" }).
Continuation injection is not performed with deliverAs: "followUp"; runtime source shows only sendUserMessage(prompt).
Full coding-agent Vitest suite exits non-zero because test/suite/final-qa.test.ts Scenario 2 fails (rm * deny rule).
Contract allow-list audit fails because commit 619efcff deleted packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todowrite.ts, which falls outside the strict path allow-list.
Combined git-safety contract fails because the same allow-list violation appears in mission commit history, even though no forbidden git verbs were reported.

appliedUpdates.description: Added continuation-core concurrency guidance plus grep-check and manual-cli flow-validator guidance sections.
